title: Brotein name collision — App Store rejected the trademark
html:
Brotein hit a name-collision wall in App Store Connect — "the app name you entered is already being used. If you have trademark rights to this name and would like it released for your use, submit a claim." Subtitle "For the Gen Z Gym Bro", category Health & Fitness / Food & Drink, bundle com.yahirgonzalez.brotein.

TL;DR

  • Brotein's App Store name was blocked — another developer holds the "Brotein" listing; Yahir must file an Apple trademark claim to release it.
  • Subtitle "For the Gen Z Gym Bro" defines the target persona on the listing page.
  • Bundle ID com.yahirgonzalez.brotein confirms the project lives under Yahir's individual developer account, not an org.

brotein · app store connect · trademark claim · name collision · gen z gym bro
